payload.title: Intro
payload.content: Virtual filesystem retrieval exposes ls cd cat find and grep without a sandbox. It provides deterministic navigation over indexed files.

payload.title: Architecture
payload.content: The service keeps a path tree in memory, uses Redis for hot cache, and stores chunks in Qdrant metadata payloads for quick retrieval.

payload.title: Search
payload.content: Coarse filtering narrows candidate files in Qdrant. Fine filtering runs regex matching in memory for fast grep style behavior.

payload.title: Grep
payload.content: Use grep recursively to find exact phrases like deterministic navigation and path tree cache. Results remain auditable by path and line.

payload.title: Endpoints
payload.content: API endpoints include health checks and tool routes for ls cd cat grep find and write with tenant scoped state.
